newsSince: No material new company news since June 9. Q1 2026 (rev +14% YoY, SECaaS ARR +59% to $33.7M, GAAP operating income positive, FY guidance $113-117M reaffirmed, SECaaS growth raised to 40%+) was reported in early May. Mid-June items are minor governance/insider events (a board-member resignation and an executive stock move), not fundamental.

verdicts.rankRationale: Test-time-scaling lens via network-intelligence/traffic-control. Operating trajectory is improving (SECaaS-led growth, turned GAAP-profitable) but all reported pre-Jun-9; mid-June board/insider items are immaterial. No new catalyst; hold vs peers.
verdicts.bull: Three straight quarters of double-digit growth, SECaaS ARR +59%, now GAAP-profitable with strong cash flow.
verdicts.neutral: Improving security software story, but the AI/test-time-scaling linkage is thematic rather than direct.
verdicts.bear: Sub-$0.35B cap with -24% YTD; network-intelligence relevance to AI scaling is loose and board churn adds noise.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Continued SECaaS ARR acceleration and operating-margin expansion through 2026.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Telco-capex dependence and tenuous AI-scaling fit limit re-rating; governance turnover.
